uplink.description: Clamp metering frame: current, voltage, active power and consumed-energy index for one clamp
uplink._note: Synthetic clamp frame built to the upstream object-stream layout (header 0x00 + declared length, then type-0x40 clamp objects with measure codes 1=current, 10=voltage, 4=power, 3=consumedActiveEnergyIndex). expected.data derived via reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle: 5000 mA, 230 V, 1500 W, 1000000 Wh) and mapped to power.current/voltage/active and metering.energy.total. Satisfies power-meter.

uplink.description: Declared payload length does not match actual length -> error
uplink._note: The header's declared length must equal total length - 2 (upstream guard).
